userIntent: Map static deployment readiness evidence before deployment planning.

confidence.reason: Static deployment evidence was inspected, but provider credentials and deployed state were not verified.

commands.purpose: Render a static deployment preflight report.
commands.outputSummary: Reported static deployment config files, docs, platform indicators, risk indicators, skipped items, and not-verified provider areas.

findings.summary: Static deployment evidence was mapped without deployment behavior.

risks.summary: Provider and deployed service state may differ from static repository evidence.
evidence: runtime health checks were not performed

changedState.summary: No project, Git, dependency, runtime, service, database, cloud provider, remote, deployment, or generated-output state changed.

handoffSummary: Static deployment evidence is mapped; deployment execution and provider state remain unverified.
recommendedNextAction: Review reported deployment surfaces before separately approving any platform-specific deployment work.
